text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I go to the training track and find...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Jooordaaaaan! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You can't paint your nails on the course! What are
you thinking?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, just gimme a sec, Bamboo. I literally only
have to let the top coat dry and then I'm good!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let it dry ? Look! Do you even need to be painting your nails here to begin with?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, it's way more motivating to run with pretty nails!
choice_data_list: Nail polish protects your nails too.
Nail polish protects your nails too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you pulling my leg?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow. You know your stuff. So you've got your
nails done too?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you like, a top-coat-only kinda person?
Or do you use more than just polish?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Uhh, what're you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Also, you know where this is going, right,
Bamboo? You've totally gotta do your nails too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What do you mean "where this is going"?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Kinda like Othello, you know? You flip and end
up a nail-doer yourself 'cause you got
sandwiched.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No thanks! They'll come right off the second I
swing my bamboo sword!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Then, like, what about decorating your sword?
Same-same.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Decorate my sword?! Th-that never occurred to
me!
choice_data_list: That doesn't sound like a great idea...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ooh, you're totally in on this. Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's nothing to "woo" about! No way I'm
decorating it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, welp, jokes aside, nails will legit make your
race pop, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
How's about a design to match your signature
racewear? I've got the colors here, so I can do
your nails for you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A design that matches my signature racewear...
Th-that does sound like it'd get me fired up...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, my nails are dry.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All righty, I'll teach you next time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're not gonna do them for me?! C'mon,
what's your deal?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Y-you being serious here?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Decorate... my bamboo sword... Make it... shiny?
Blind my opponents?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's playing dirty!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Honestly, that idea never even occurred to me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, just quit worrying and do it! Honestly, decorating a bamboo sword's such a first! It'll totally be fire!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, hey! Where are you taking me?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Thanks for saying that. You really saved
me, boss!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, but I could've played around with so many
designs! It would've been seriously fun.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, listen. This bamboo sword is a symbol of my
soul!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's a pure and righteous blade that cuts through
corruption! How could you even think of
decorating my precious—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, my nails are dry now. Back to training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey! I was talking to you! WAIT UP!
